name: al-Qaeda network (composite)
composite_of: Composite of al-Qaeda core and its regional affiliates (AQIM, AQAP, al-Shabaab lineage).
notes: The franchising network the post-2001 story is about.

name: Islamic State lineage (composite)
composite_of: Composite of the IS lineage and its 'provinces' (emerges from the AQI split; Levant, Sahel, Lake Chad, Khorasan).

name: Ethno-nationalist separatists (composite)
composite_of: Composite of ethno-territorial separatist movements (Caucasus, Mindanao, southern Thailand, Kurdish lineages).
notes: Locally rooted; bargains and fights by turns.

name: Narco-insurgency (composite)
composite_of: Composite of revenue-driven armed groups funded by illicit economies (FARC-lineage, cartel-adjacent).
notes: Funded by the trade it protects; the Andes/Plan-Colombia archetype.
